death.
35-36. If the Moon is hemmed between two malefics, be in the Ascendant, 7th, or 8th and be in
aspect to weak benefics, (infant) death follows. Should malefics be in 7th and 8th and be
aspected by malefics, the child dies along with its mother. If there be aspect from benefics in
such a case, the mother becomes sick (there will not be immediate death).
37-38. If the Moon be eclipsed and be in the Ascendant along with malefics, while Mars is in 8th,
the child quits the world along with its mother. The mother dies of weapons along with the
child, if it be a solar eclipse with Sun and malefics in the Ascendant, while Mars is in 8th.
Should weak Moon be in the Ascendant and malefics be angular, or in 8th, without benefics
aspect, death is imminent. This view is of Satyacarya.
31

39-40. The undermentioned combinations cause death soon. Sun in 7th, while Saturn, or Mars is
in Ascendant.
